languages.text: До конца боя {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракция витального компонента{/g} не имеет {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}периода восстановления{/g} и может выбирать целью врагов, но каждое использование наносит Эоганну {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

traits.locale_text: До конца боя {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракция витального компонента{/g} не имеет {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}периода восстановления{/g} и может выбирать целью врагов, но каждое использование наносит Эоганну {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

До конца боя {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Экстракция витального компонента{/g} не имеет {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}периода восстановления{/g} и может выбирать целью врагов, но каждое использование наносит Эоганну {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямого урона{/g}.

languages.text: Bis zum Ende des Kampfes hat {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vitalkomponenten-Extraktion{/g} keine {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}Abklingzeit{/g} und kann Gegner anvisieren, aber jeder Einsatz fügt Eogunn {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: Bis zum Ende des Kampfes hat {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vitalkomponenten-Extraktion{/g} keine {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}Abklingzeit{/g} und kann Gegner anvisieren, aber jeder Einsatz fügt Eogunn {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} zu.

languages.text: Hasta el final del combate, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extracción de componente vital{/g} no tiene {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}tiempo de recuperación{/g} y puede utilizarse contra enemigos, pero cada uso inflige {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a Eogunn.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: Hasta el final del combate, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extracción de componente vital{/g} no tiene {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}tiempo de recuperación{/g} y puede utilizarse contra enemigos, pero cada uso inflige {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a Eogunn.

languages.text: {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}关键构件萃取{/g}无{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}冷却时间{/g}，且可以以敌人为目标，但每次使用会对伊奥贡造成{uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}，持续至战斗结束。
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}关键构件萃取{/g}无{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}冷却时间{/g}，且可以以敌人为目标，但每次使用会对伊奥贡造成{uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab}点{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}，持续至战斗结束。

languages.text: Çatışma sonuna dek {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Hayati Bileşen Çıkarımı{/g} kabiliyetinin {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}dolum süresi{/g} bulunmaz ve düşmanları hedefleyebilir ancak her kullanım, Eogunn'a {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: Çatışma sonuna dek {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Hayati Bileşen Çıkarımı{/g} kabiliyetinin {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}dolum süresi{/g} bulunmaz ve düşmanları hedefleyebilir ancak her kullanım, Eogunn'a {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text: Jusqu'à la fin du combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extraction de composant vital{/g} n'a pas de {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}temps de recharge{/g} et peut cibler des ennemis, mais chaque utilisation inflige {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à Eogunn.
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: Jusqu'à la fin du combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Extraction de composant vital{/g} n'a pas de {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}temps de recharge{/g} et peut cibler des ennemis, mais chaque utilisation inflige {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à Eogunn.

languages.text: 戦闘終了まで、{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}重要部品の摘出{/g}は{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}クールダウン{/g}がなくなり敵を対象にできるようになるが、使用のたびにエオガンに{uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab}の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。
languages.original_text: Until the end of combat, {g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}Vital Component Extraction{/g} has no {g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}cooldown{/g} and can target enemies, but each use deals {uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab} {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}direct damage{/g} to Eogunn.

traits.locale_text: 戦闘終了まで、{g|f:de5efb5d30254f5d90a121f284c17a7d}重要部品の摘出{/g}は{g|Encyclopedia:Cooldown}クールダウン{/g}がなくなり敵を対象にできるようになるが、使用のたびにエオガンに{uip|Damage|fc71d3c279394a6f9f28a3e5c01da3ab}の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。
